name_en: New version Cognac: 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, a mainstay on the official website, this is absolutely a hit🔥 style this year. Top-tier imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front embossed logo matches the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, zippered pocket, many celebrities and influencers are wearing it. Dimensions 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging
